name: ReadBuildNum
description: Finds BuildNum.xml anywhere under the sources directory, reads the BuildNum value, and sets it as the pipeline variable BuildNum.
helpMarkDown: Searches recursively for `BuildNum.xml` under `Build.SourcesDirectory`, then exposes its `<BuildNum>` element value as the pipeline variable `BuildNum`.
author: jjvanzon

outputVariables.name: BuildNum
outputVariables.description: The build number value read from BuildNum.xml.
